title: EVM lands next week: Ethereum and BNB Chain both go live
content_html:
EVM support arrives on Cryptool next week, with Ethereum and BNB Chain going live at the same time.

For any team or fund already operating on the two largest EVM ecosystems, that means Cryptool is now in direct reach: a much wider universe of projects, investors and fundraising pools opens up overnight.

Alongside the EVM launch, one of the larger players in the space is onboarding to run high-volume OTC fundraises directly through Cryptool. Anyone interested in early access to those allocations can message the team for an introduction.

This is the start of a much broader Cryptool footprint across the EVM world.
author: Cryptool
